samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO with configurable depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal used for synchronous write operations.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal used for synchronous read operations.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal. Defined as 0 for reset and 1 for reset signal inactive.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal. Used to trigger write operations.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal. Used to trigger read operations.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input. The width [WIDTH-1:0] is configurable and represents the data to be written into the FIFO.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal. Indicates if the FIFO is full and cannot accept further write operations.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal. Indicates if the FIFO is empty and cannot provide any data for read operations.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output. The width [WIDTH-1:0] is configurable and represents the data read from the FIFO.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="WIDTH" value="8">Width of the data bus.</constant>
        <constant id="DEPTH" value="16">Depth of the FIFO.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Dual-port RAM instantiation
        <instance id="ram" module="dual_port_RAM" width="WIDTH" depth="DEPTH">
            <port id="wclk" connection="wclk"/>
            <port id="wenc" connection="wen"/>
            <port id="waddr" connection="waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]"/>
            <port id="wdata" connection="wdata"/>
            <port id="rclk" connection="rclk"/>
            <port id="renc" connection="ren"/>
            <port id="raddr" connection="raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]"/>
            <port id="rdata" connection="rdata"/>
        </instance>
        
        // Write pointer management
        <reg id="waddr_bin" width="$clog2(DEPTH)">
            <always_comb>
                if (winc && wrstn) begin
                    waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
                end else if (!wrstn) begin
                    waddr_bin <= 0;
                end
            </always_comb>
        </reg>
        <wire id="wptr" width="4">
            <assign wptr[0] = waddr_bin[0];
            <assign wptr[1] = waddr_bin[1] ^ waddr_bin[0];
            <assign wptr[2] = waddr_bin[2] ^ waddr_bin[1];
            <assign wptr[3] = waddr_bin[3] ^ waddr_bin[2];
        </wire>
        <reg id="wptr_buff" width="4">
            <always_comb>
                if (winc && wrstn) begin
                    wptr_buff <= wptr;
                end else if (!wrstn) begin
                    wptr_buff <= 0;
                end
            </always_comb>
        </reg>
        <wire id="wfull">
            <assign wfull = (wptr == {~rptr_buff[3], rptr_buff[2:0]});
        </wire>
        
        // Read pointer management
        <reg id="raddr_bin" width="$clog2(DEPTH)">
            <always_comb>
                if (rinc && rrstn) begin
                    raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
                end else if (!rrstn) begin
                    raddr_bin <= 0;
                end
            </always_comb>
        </reg>
        <wire id="rptr" width="4">
            <assign rptr[0] = raddr_bin[0];
            <assign rptr[1] = raddr_bin[1] ^ raddr_bin[0];
            <assign rptr[2] = raddr_bin[2] ^ raddr_bin[1];
            <assign rptr[3] = raddr_bin[3] ^ raddr_bin[2];
        </wire>
        <reg id="rptr_buff" width="4">
            <always_comb>
                if (rinc && rrstn) begin
                    rptr_buff <= rptr;
                end else if (!rrstn) begin
                    rptr_buff <= 0;
                end
            </always_comb>
        </reg>
        <wire id="rempty">
            <assign rempty = (rptr == wptr);
        </wire>
        
        // Control signals
        <wire id="wen">
            <assign wen = winc && !wfull;
        </wire>
        <wire id="ren">
            <assign ren = rinc && !rempty;
        </wire>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Asynchronously manages data flow between a producer and consumer using dual-port RAM and pointer buffers for synchronization.</implementation>
</module>
